business_description: Digital agency specialising in website design & development, social media management, SEO, data analytics (Power BI), mobile app development, and TradeDesk (WhatsApp expense manager for sole traders). Website design is the core service.
service_area: Scotland primary (targeting Glasgow/Edinburgh market), UK-wide secondary
target_audience: Small businesses, tradespeople, local services, and SMEs across Scotland and the UK
usp: Websites that rival Edinburgh's top agencies — built faster, priced fairer. A one-person digital agency with enterprise-level skills, transparent pricing, and proper support.
features: Portfolio with video preview thumbnails (autoplay MP4s showing websites scrolling)
Sticky stacking project cards or video portfolio grid
Minimal navigation (logo + CTA visible, full menu behind hamburger)
Existing tool pages remain live and indexed but removed from navigation
style_notes: Dark mode foundation. One warm accent colour used sparingly. Premium sans-serif typeface with massive fluid headings. Generous whitespace. Every animation demonstrates what the agency can build. The site IS the portfolio — proof of capability.

competitors.name: Digital Studio
competitors.notes: Dumfries, modern Nuxt.js, only 4 portfolio items

competitors.name: Eskdale Solutions
competitors.notes: Gretna/Carlisle, 19 years, poor site, no testimonials

competitors.name: 4D Web Design
competitors.notes: Carlisle, 20+ years, most credible cross-border competitor

existing_assets: 4 live projects: Not an Octavia (ML used car deals), gAIns (AI gym tracker), Daily Duel (mini-games), Tumble Tots (childminding). Free tools: VAT checker, invoice generator, site audit. No professional photography — portfolio is live project URLs.
color_preferences: Dark mode. Warm accent (not cold blue). References lean toward coral/peach, electric blue, or hot pink as accents on dark backgrounds.
brief_summary: Redesign of Nith Digital's own agency website. Current site is text-heavy with no images, no scroll animations, and inline React styles — reads as a developer side project, not a professional agency. The redesign must establish credibility for cold call follow-ups, showcase portfolio with motion (video thumbnails), and demonstrate the agency's technical capabilities through its own design. Target market is Scottish small businesses, positioning against Glasgow/Edinburgh agencies on quality-to-price ratio. Dark mode, minimal, animation-rich. 5 design proposals requested.

design_references.what_works: Scroll-triggered word-by-word text reveals, image transitions, WebGL 3D background, electric blue accent on dark
design_references.component_notes: SplitType per-word animation, custom scroll engine with lerp, dot-scale-to-fill CTA hover

design_references.what_works: Portfolio cards with autoplay MP4 videos showing websites scrolling, numbered narrative sections, coral accent on white
design_references.component_notes: HTML5 video autoplay loop muted playsinline, GSAP Flip for showreel, double-label button hover

design_references.what_works: CSS sticky stacking project cards creating slideshow on scroll, dark mode with warm peach accent, no traditional nav
design_references.component_notes: position:sticky cards, curtain wipe hero reveal, Ken Burns zoom, conic gradient button glow, 2s transitions

design_references.what_works: Lava lamp 3D background with frosted glass overlay, extreme typography size variation, animated gradient headings
design_references.component_notes: Spline 3D sphere + backdrop-filter:blur(30px), PP Neue Montreal + Syne dual sans-serif, Framer Motion

design_references.what_works: Text moves at different speeds when scrolling (per-line parallax), restrained 3-colour system, massive H1 at 15vw
design_references.component_notes: GSAP ScrollTrigger + Lenis, per-line translateY with speed multipliers, FK Grotesk Neue, Barba.js page transitions

design_constraints: Dark mode foundation — all 5 designs must use a dark background as default
Maximum 3 colours (one dark base, one neutral, one accent) — separation comes from whitespace, not colour changes
Heading font sizes must use vw units and exceed 6vw on desktop for hero headings
Navigation must be minimal — logo + one CTA button visible, everything else behind a hamburger menu
Portfolio section must include motion — either autoplay video thumbnails or scroll-driven card animation, never static image grids
No section may use a coloured background band — all section separation via whitespace and typography scale
Transitions must be slow (minimum 0.4s) with custom cubic-bezier easing, not generic ease-in-out
